title: MONTHLY POP-UP MEDICAL CLINIC - 211info
text: BLACK THISTLE STREET AID MONTHLY POP-UP MEDICAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a pop-up medical clinic in a public park once per month and mobile medical care for individuals experiencing homelessness. Services include wound care, herbal and medical provider consultations, reproductive health information, first aid, harm reduction and hygiene supplies. Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: 2nd Wednesday of the month 11am-2pm Email (541) 232-8546 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 232-8546 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 2nd Wednesday of the month 11am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Washington Jefferson Park at or near the corner of 5th Street and Washington Street Lane Transit District bus EmX Monroe/7th station (westbound) and Monroe/6th station (eastbound) Services: First Aid Kits Harm Reduction Test Strip Distribution Mobile Health Care Mobile Health Care * Reproductive Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies Safe Sex Supplies Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
